text: METHODOLOGY validated: the analytic picture-decisiveness model is render-faithful. Rasterizing the marginal problem geom_06 in real matplotlib gives a dip 2x3 px at 256px (sub-threshold, exactly the predicted dropout), 5x5 px at 512px, 6x6 px at 640px -- matching the analytic px-footprint. So the construction-side answer to q-0008 stands on validated ground: the Study-8 corpus is 8/8 picture-decisive (residual plot for geom_05) AND sampling-fragile, with the plot's effective resolution beating the catching grid by 4x-30x (median 23x), robust across 9 plot/threshold settings save geom_06 at thumbnail size. The CPU construction of q-0008 is COMPLETE and audited; only the paid forced_visual-vs-forced_textual A/B on this corpus remains.
